name: Strawberry Ice
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar and water in a medium saucepan.
2. Heat, stirring until the sugar dissolves.
3. Boil for 5 minutes.
4. Allow to cool.
5. Force berries through a food mill or blend in a blender or food processor.
6. Strain to remove seeds if desired.
7. Blend strawberry puree and lemon and orange juices into syrup.
8. Pour into freezer trays and freeze.
9. Remove from the freezer 20 minutes before serving.
10. Turn mixture into a bowl and stir with a wooden spoon until smooth.
To make an especially attractive dessert, present scoops of ice in cantaloupe or honeydew melon halves. Makes 8 to 12 servings.
